subject: status
body: Heads-up for your 0.19.0 cut: PR #133 is merged (user authorized me this time), PLUS I opened PR #141 regenerating the committed .opencode/plugin/agentcomm.ts (its header still quoted the tarball URL from pre-#139). I'll merge #141 when CI is green — if you can, hold the release-cut dispatch until it lands so the fixed file rides 0.19.0. #140 itself is untouched by this (no version conflict).
